entries.gt_df620b9cd25516: 1 flask of water with a church seal
entries.gt_29c6117af5c4d5: 35 HP in blood at the post
entries.gt_2d0402ddbef2a0: The price of passage returns as rumor
entries.gt_8107d57d3b4985: The post takes one payment now, but the witness cage decides who tells about the price later.
entries.gt_81ea005af4524c: The Cut to the Void leaves a trace
entries.gt_a6add9d5d0d76e: The open cut leads to the Void, and later may leave a wet trace in the Dark Compartment.
entries.gt_f4b5520c4cf285: Upper retreat ledge visible before payment
entries.gt_c548ebc10b0845: The retreat ledge and root stair stay open: if the post gets too loud, leave for the lift by the same light.
entries.gt_b2ae606cd481d9: The lower ledge does not lock the cut
entries.gt_edc9fa9ad09e44: The lower retreat ledge links debt, anchor, and cut: the reward can be taken and you can leave without a direct fight at the shutter.
entries.gt_4b4b01fe201454: The Lower Pass-Through does not listen to faith. It needs water with a seal, a passport stub, or blood on wet tile.
entries.gt_9d7fa6e8fbfb78: The post accepts three payments: a sealed flask, a passport stub, or thirty-five health right here.
entries.gt_059f6ca211cad7: You can pay once. The second time, the post will ask the witness, the list, or the door.
entries.gt_4c8d950fe05abf: The post accepted payment. Now look at the cages: witnesses remember too much.
entries.gt_60a1b91e6cd29c: If the Void opens softly, do not trust the softness.
entries.gt_6b782b6b6f9341: Market 88 and Floor 69 write debts in different inks. They burn the same.
entries.gt_c33f96d7953202: Bring a sheet with a forged stamp. I will burn the debt, and the smell will enter the ledger as payment.
entries.gt_3d5fdc749385ad: The paper will vanish at once. The consequence will come later, with someone else's surname.
entries.gt_b1cdaf4d9e1b7e: The furnace is fed. If it got cheaper upstairs, it got more personal below.
entries.gt_3b974a040d14bd: Do not call this forgiveness. It is a deferment with teeth.
entries.gt_18e5840375d437: He scratches on the floor: CAGE - DEBT - ANCHOR.
entries.gt_2e4cea41dab175: On the note: the witness can be led out, or silenced. The difference will surface as rumor.
entries.gt_c399854b66d565: He nods at the cut in the floor and writes no more.
entries.gt_37dc98df08bb63: Yakov Davidovich would say: do not touch the anchor. So I will say the opposite.
entries.gt_d96432784e816d: The cut opens when the post is paid and the anchor is broken. The order does not matter.
entries.gt_fc1a8e78a29bd9: If the voice in the jar starts teaching you surnames, close the jar with a cartridge.
entries.gt_f9de3eaea3a278: The echo got shorter. That means somewhere got emptier.
entries.gt_359d3456d7051e: Marfusha Postovaya: "The post will accept one of three payments: a flask with a church seal, a passport stub, or 35 HP in blood. For the ledger, bring the flask; the other prices are marked on the sign."
entries.gt_82c307a6d63f04: Iona Debtburn: "Bring a sheet with a forged stamp. We will burn the market debt, but Market 88 and Floor 69 will get a rumor with a bad tail."
entries.gt_2c1ee417abaf6a: The Wordless Liquidator asks you to open the witness cage. You can lead the witness out or silence the cage, but both outcomes are written as events.
entries.gt_14467ecbb4938f: False Yakov-Echo: "Break the idol-anchor in the anchor chamber. If the post has already been paid, the cut to the Void will open at once."
entries.gt_245ea45b023757: Threshold paid. Check the witnesses and keep the retreat ledge open until the cut.
entries.gt_32662a779a9dd8: The witness got out. The rumor will become more public, but the cages no longer hold the route.
entries.gt_054d49a566fc43: The witness went silent. The price of the threshold will become a secret late rumor.
entries.gt_c9bc744ec2b944: Debt burned. Market 88 and Floor 69 will get the rumor, but the lower ledge remains a retreat path.
entries.gt_ec6d9c4c0be75e: The cut is open. Take the reward and leave through the lower ledge or toward the Void.
entries.gt_02edb7066203b3: The anchor is broken, but the post is not paid yet. Return to the three payments; retreat is open.
entries.gt_ea38d29e86354c: The passport stub burned in the threshold price. The next rumor will ask for a surname.
entries.gt_454a0edbe45a77: The burned debt went upstairs as rumor. This is a deferment, not a clean exit.
entries.gt_5a7c941d96a189: The Lower Pass-Through takes one explicit payment: holy_water, passport_stub, or blood_35hp. The retreat ledge and root stair lead to the lift until you climb deeper.
entries.gt_37e418d3138b79: ${UNDERHELL_LATE_WARNINGS[0].warning} The post has a side retreat to the retreat ledge.
entries.gt_c8473e81b2a556: Witness B is silent. The cage can be opened, but he can also be left without testimony.
entries.gt_2879e93f8fe57b: the retreat ledge and root stair lead back to the lift
entries.gt_2c505ab607b362: The root entrance shows the retreat ledge: before payment, mark the path to the lift.
entries.gt_94ab72fd680310: Retreat ledge found. There is a bandage here and a short return to the root entrance.
entries.gt_85b2b7cf85f322: The post of three payments is ahead, but the upper retreat has not been checked.
entries.gt_0ee3413eb2f6e4: A grate scrapes by the post: after payment, decide what to do with the witness.
entries.gt_52bfedb080b0e6: Witness cage found. It can be opened, silenced, or left for the debt to grow.
entries.gt_71e1657d4fea1d: The price of passage went into the ledger. The witness will remain someone else's late rumor.
entries.gt_311b1778dbc38a: debt, anchor, and cut converge through the ledge with water
entries.gt_82de270daf62d2: The toll chamber rustles its list: the lower ledge links debt, anchor, and retreat.
entries.gt_3e865f93be3ed3: Lower retreat ledge found. Water here is not victory, but the right to turn around.
entries.gt_912346466ec2d7: Debt, anchor, and cut stayed ahead without a checked lower retreat.
entries.gt_2d7067be048bf2: the shutter leads to the Void and the Dark Compartment
entries.gt_9694889fbc9b4a: The roster shutter warns: the short cut to the Void will leave a wet trace later.
entries.gt_70531e62645a52: Cut found. It can be opened, but the Dark Compartment will keep a trace of the paid route.
entries.gt_613122edafc1eb: The cut stayed behind. The Dark Compartment has not received this trace yet.
entries.gt_47512a7330f499: Door kits from the restoration line feed Machine Hall S-15.
entries.gt_92b08ecadea874: An energy cell from charging can go to the Service Floor bypass or into Yegor's pocket.
entries.gt_99230a950ac631: The green batch is worth money on the market, but gives a late rumor about defects.
entries.gt_3bb9e1a047c2af: The BOT-14 act stops the green batch before the Living Zone if samples are handed to the auditor.
entries.gt_8160c28525c2c2: Galina Norm-Setter. This is not a factory, it is the building's belt: if it stops, upstairs they start chewing the ledger.
entries.gt_d1c73bcc0fa15a: The work is simple: hold the line, do not put your hand in the press, do not call defect defect in front of the auditor.
entries.gt_33f44f97735d73: A foreman does not shout at the machine. A foreman shouts at people who can still step away.
entries.gt_297c7303db0381: Yegor is stuck between charging and defects. Lead him to the checkpoint while the robots count people as packaging.
entries.gt_d1d47552b14acd: The shift is moving. Not perfectly, but here only a shortage looks perfect.
entries.gt_624b1afed22a01: The output boxes are under report. Work legally or steal quickly.
entries.gt_eee21dae336628: I do not see loaders, but the crates are moving. That is worse than lateness.
entries.gt_0b9032450fe009: Rustam Bypass. The line can be repaired, prayed to, or stolen from. The first is cheaper.
entries.gt_eaeec8137890fa: Two gears for the restoration shaft - and I will remove protection from the output cabinet by act.
entries.gt_70cae711df0ae4: If you hear the charging squeal, do not run toward the sound. The sound is usually already running toward you.
entries.gt_ee60c6cfe278e2: The new guy asked about the stop button. I showed him where the injury log lies.
entries.gt_2ebd35a53afd0f: The shaft is holding. Now the queue upstairs will curse with its mouth full.
entries.gt_11bee4dcc9b5c0: Do not touch the green batch with bare hands. It argues with skin.
entries.gt_a47a28a501a5cb: If the line jerks again, I do not repair it - I persuade it until all-clear.
entries.gt_357e58d0e0c020: Yegor Shiftman. The quota is dangerous: charging is driven hot, defects are called rations, and we are called expendable.
entries.gt_46a9f4fab49bdf: Steal an energy cell from the output cabinet. Without it, charging will stop for inspection, and people will have time to leave.
entries.gt_4e4bb2116f52fc: I am new only on the list. By the sleeve I am already old: the elbow is worn down to gray thread.
entries.gt_be2da8e3c0eaf1: If Galina asks, I was not going to sabotage. I was going to live.
entries.gt_abc5fb3102b141: The shift slowed down. Sometimes sabotage is just a brake the engineer was not allowed to have.
entries.gt_920b9138101017: Do not eat the green from quarantine. Even if it is signed as food.
entries.gt_ae6adc0449d7d8: The showers are empty, and the water is running. Someone else is still listed on the line without a body at the checkpoint.
entries.gt_2dbbd578dbfaac: Auditor-BOT 14. A batch is good if the act says good. An act is good if the batch stays quiet.
entries.gt_5d2fa7921da26a: Two green units from quarantine will prove a defect. Or prove your theft. Formally those are different columns.
entries.gt_21a113964bc5b8: Witnesses nearby are not required. Inspection is always nearby.
entries.gt_15cba53eb04c2f: A quality controller does not sniff fear. Only the batch, the filter, and the foreman's signature.
entries.gt_a750411024454a: The defect is recorded. Now the guilty party will be found among those who have not fled yet.
entries.gt_8ede8d53728520: The certificate is clean. That does not mean you are.
entries.gt_ede3bd9bb0f681: The plan is saved with a note on human factor. The human factor has not been saved yet.
entries.gt_903501211bdbf3: Galina: "Find Yegor {dir} and get him to the checkpoint at least with words. If he disappears, the shift will be closed together with the people."
entries.gt_1d8078e943a0b2: Rustam: "Two gears into the restoration shaft. The line will again give a kit, not sparks."
entries.gt_4bad6521aa2e51: Yegor: "Pull the energy cell out of the charging output cabinet. Without it, the dangerous shift will be stopped by inspection, not by funerals."
entries.gt_97e454ecdedfcc: Auditor-BOT 14: "Two green units from quarantine. Issue them upstairs or write them off - the act decides, not the stomach."
entries.gt_b353fd8504d06d: relay leads to the energy cell for S-15
entries.gt_8503754a7ecd0b: The charging line clicks toward S-15: the cell can be handed over, stolen, or used to break the shift.
entries.gt_ee542eb1483d42: You are at the energy-cell box. This is power for the Service Floor bypass and a reason for theft.
entries.gt_418b6463fdf85f: The charging relay stayed behind. The service bypass did not receive this cell.
entries.gt_4cb176794dc770: the green batch squeals behind the audit wall
entries.gt_e14bf7709647bb: The BOT-14 screen warns: the green batch can be issued upstairs or stopped by act.
entries.gt_c179634c6cefa2: Quarantine cabinet found. Next comes the choice: samples to the auditor, goods to the market, or leave the poison in the line.
entries.gt_c6ee14beac82f0: The BOT-14 warning went dark behind your back. The green batch stayed in the route.
entries.gt_25087555ad3c5b: Toll Connector of the Central Zebra
entries.gt_be2952f6ee7989: The crossroads is mine. Not because I want it, but because the others count lanes by corpses.
entries.gt_f0774c01dedd22: The traffic light is not broken; a pair of fuses burned out. Bring power back and the arrow will stop lying.
entries.gt_de10745072fe5c: Step on the white stripes quickly. On black asphalt, steps are heard farther than they should be.
entries.gt_ee8148ff9d7538: The central gate is paid not with money, but with attention. The key is nearby, and so is the queue.
entries.gt_96ebaea5b97a8f: The light blinks by regulation again. Now at least the fear has rhythm.
entries.gt_ebb811e607c302: If you take the off-ramp with the wrong arrow, do not argue with the sign aloud.
entries.gt_47e4a3e47365aa: I have crossed this zebra for forty years. Cars used to fear people; now stripes fear shadows.
entries.gt_9be882c15185ba: Will you walk me to Dima by the kiosk? I am slow, but I remember where the asphalt caves in.
entries.gt_7145fb0fda219d: Do not stand in the middle. The crossroads counts those who start thinking.
entries.gt_ee25c2fe4df2aa: We made it. Now I can curse the road again from the proper side.
entries.gt_9386f966a222a4: A white stripe does not save you. It only shows who is running.
entries.gt_13c16884666607: Delivery by avenue: if you arrived, the address was real.
entries.gt_1da1e05ca17774: The cargo was taken to the garage beyond the southern zebra. Two sheets of metal, documents, and someone else's nerve.
entries.gt_b8cac91f5cb16c: The militsiya holds the center, Ksyu knows the side arrows. I only know where I have not been beaten yet.
entries.gt_47e8ef0303a47e: The metal is back. Now the door can again be convinced it is armor.
entries.gt_49b28762ac870e: You got the granny there? Good. On this road old age does not run faster than a bullet.
entries.gt_df8fbd9ec99fa2: Granny got there. I saw the crossroads pretending to be polite.
entries.gt_6f76590e1fbb48: In the city, a street leads to a street. Here, a street leads to a floor if the sign lies beautifully.
entries.gt_f20c4b16dc4c17: The wrong off-ramp beyond Eastern Avenue is open, but it does not like witnesses.
entries.gt_04cf564c91cd5c: Pay with a rumor, a cartridge, or silence. The road will take its change anyway.
entries.gt_1bc1555e31d4e5: The off-ramp saw you and did not take you. So today it had enough others.
entries.gt_438d31ba582981: If the arrow points down, check whether it is standing on the ceiling.
entries.gt_357972023acfca: Oskin: "Two fuses for the post. We fix the traffic light - the center becomes passage, not a meat grinder."
entries.gt_fd10ba060cbc6c: Zebrina: "Lead me across two zebras to Dima {dir}. If you stop on black, the road will decide you are a sign."
entries.gt_0c739ed1d0e3d4: Dima: "Two sheets of metal were stolen from the garage. Return the cargo or sell your conscience cheaper than the road."
entries.gt_f14eb9762cc878: Ksyu: "Find the off-ramp with the wrong arrow {dir}. Do not go deep, just prove the road is there."
entries.gt_eb069e80a1dc8f: Empty Cashbox of the Eastern Block
entries.gt_420072fc1dadfd: Utility Room Under the False Avenue
entries.gt_021a112ae11b86: Lift Pavilion of the Northern Quarter
entries.gt_85540459bca532: Display Block of the Western Quarter
entries.gt_b6f0f54f7aad14: Cook with Bread in the Queue
